Steve AI

Create animated and live-action videos with AI

6/10Overall Rating
8/10Ease of Use
$20/moStarting Price
2021Founded
Free Plan Available

About Steve AI

Steve AI is a ai video platform founded in 2021. It positions itself as “Create animated and live-action videos with AI” and is best suited for animated explainer videos, educational content. Pricing starts at $20/mo, and a free plan is available.

Features

FeatureAvailable
Text To VideoYes
Image To VideoNo
Avatar Talking HeadNo
Screen RecordingNo
Auto CaptionsYes
TemplatesYes
Stock FootageYes
Voice OverYes
Api AccessNo
Batch ProcessingNo

Pros & Cons

Pros

  • Good animation styles
  • Script-to-video pipeline
  • Large asset library
  • Multiple video styles

Cons

  • Animation quality varies
  • Limited customization
  • Can feel template-y
